disclaimer.cardOne:
### 🧪 Test mode

This AI assistant is currently in **test mode**.  
Responses may not be fully formed and _could be incorrect_.
disclaimer.cardTwo:
### 📚 Legal documents loading

Bot is studying only the **Labor Code of Uzbekistan**.  
_Other laws not fully loaded or studied._
disclaimer.cardThree:
### ⚖️ For legal questions only

Please ask only **labor relations** questions.  
_Bot not for technical or personal advice._
disclaimer.cardFour:
### 📌 Not official advice

Bot responses for **information only**.  
_They do not replace official legal advice._

info.title: Dashboard
info.organizationsDesc: Full details on all organizations, branches, and managers in 'Uzbekistan Railways' JSC system. Locations, hierarchy, and structure.
info.positionsDesc: List of positions in 'Uzbekistan Railways' JSC and their functional duties. Structural distribution by employee service positions.
info.laborCodeDesc: Labor relations, rights, and obligations between employees and employers based on Uzbekistan Labor Code. Explanations and norms by articles.
info.emptyDesc: No data in this section yet. New services or useful content coming soon.

telegramPopup.header: Connect to our Telegram bot and enjoy these conveniences:

benefit.1: Document statuses – Approvals, rejections, or edits – stay informed!
benefit.2: Greetings – We remember your birthday or work achievements!
benefit.3: Important reminders – Vacations, meetings, and key info on time.
benefit.5: Profile updates – Changes in your info, know instantly via Telegram!
benefit.footer: Everything in one place – just for you, on time!
